hooks.command: sh -c "PYTHONPATH=\"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}\" $(command -v python3 || command -v python) -m hipocampo.hooks.ensure_githooks 2>/dev/null; exit 0"
sh -c "PYTHONPATH=\"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}\" $(command -v python3 || command -v python) -m hipocampo.hooks.session_start 2>/dev/null; exit 0"
sh -c "PYTHONPATH=\"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}\" $(command -v python3 || command -v python) -m hipocampo.hooks.capture_sweep 2>/dev/null; exit 0"
